title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain, founder of Glean (valued at $7 billion), shares his approach to building high-value AI companies. His strategy emphasizes focus and differentiation, avoiding replication of existing solutions in favor of identifying genuine gaps like enterprise information discovery.
